data.title: 4ee6-ff6f: Task A — Write RED structural tests for fix-bug Step 7.1 scope-drift integration
data.description:
## Story
4ee6-ff6f — fix-bug runs scope-drift reviewer after Step 7 verification and before Gates 2a-2d

## testing_mode
RED

## TDD Test Approach
Create tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh with 6 structural assertion sections. Greps plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md for required content that does not yet exist.

Given: fix-bug SKILL.md lacks Step 7.1, scope-drift-enabled config check, and SCOPE_DRIFT_OUTPUT in printf list
When: tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh is executed
Then: all 6 test sections fail (RED) because the required content has not been added yet

## File to Create
tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh (executable)

## Test Sections (6 required)

1. **test_step_7_1_exists** — grep for 'Step 7.1' in fix-bug/SKILL.md; assert the section header exists between Step 7 and Gate 2a
2. **test_scope_drift_enabled_config_check** — grep for 'scope_drift.enabled' in fix-bug/SKILL.md; assert the config key check is present
3. **test_hard_fail_missing_agent** — grep for hard-fail language ('abort', 'hard-fail', or 'missing') near 'scope-drift-reviewer' in fix-bug/SKILL.md; assert missing agent file causes abort
4. **test_major_drift_user_prompt** — grep for 'major.drift' or 'major_drift' AND 'user' near it in fix-bug/SKILL.md; assert major-drift classification prompts user
5. **test_minor_drift_warning** — grep for 'minor.drift' or 'minor_drift' AND 'warning' near it; assert minor-drift emits warning
6. **test_scope_drift_in_escalation_router** — grep fix-bug/SKILL.md for 'SCOPE_DRIFT_OUTPUT' in the gate signals printf list section; assert scope_drift signal feeds the escalation router

## .test-index Entry (add as new entry)
plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md: tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh [test_scope_drift_step_exists]

Note: Fix-bug SKILL.md already has a .test-index entry for general tests. This adds a new entry for the specific scope-drift integration tests with a RED marker.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh
- [ ] Test file contains all 6 test sections
  Verify: grep -c 'test_step_7_1_exists\|test_scope_drift_enabled_config_check\|test_hard_fail_missing_agent\|test_major_drift_user_prompt\|test_minor_drift_warning\|test_scope_drift_in_escalation_router' tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] Running the test suite produces failures (RED state confirmed)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] .test-index entry added with RED marker
  Verify: grep 'plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md.*test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh.*\[test_scope_drift_step_exists\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
